system: battery-magnet train inside an uninsulated copper solenoid
signConvention: direction +1 is right; -1 is left; conventional current follows the battery polarity
limits: Relative force is a teaching index, not a force in newtons.
Friction, contact resistance, battery internal resistance, coil pitch, heating and terminal speed are not simulated.
A reversed end magnet is represented as zero net thrust to teach loss of same-direction force addition.
